# Card Description Review — simpler, non-redundant, accurate, non-gamer-clear

Adversarial multi-agent review of all 164 card descriptions (2026-06-05). 15 reviewers
flagged candidates; every proposed rewrite was then independently verified for (1) accuracy
vs. the engine, (2) information preservation, and (3) genuine simplification. 33 changes
confirmed, 6 rejected.

**Key fact:** descriptions are generated by `formatCardDescription()` in
`src/systems/cards/CardText.ts` from each card's `effects`, and
`tests/audit/card-integrity-audit.test.ts` enforces stored == generated byte-for-byte.
So every change below is a **formatter rule change**, applied via `CardText.ts` then
re-baked with `node scripts/regenerate-card-descriptions.mjs`. No `effects` values,
counts, durations, costs, or scalers change — wording/ordering/redundancy only.

## Implementation status — DONE (2026-06-05)

All 33 changes implemented in `src/systems/cards/CardText.ts` and re-baked with
`node scripts/regenerate-card-descriptions.mjs` (58 stored descriptions updated).
`card-integrity-audit` passes (stored == generated byte-for-byte); full suite 745
passed (the one failure, `StyleConstants.test.ts` expecting font "Inter", is from a
separate font rework and is unrelated). TypeScript typecheck clean.

**Consistency decisions (deviate slightly from the agents' literal strings):**
- Standardized **every** "For N seconds" duration aura to a comma (the canonical
  Razor Stance style) instead of only the flagged ones — leaving the rest on colons
  would be inconsistent. This also updated **23 non-flagged cards** (pure colon→comma,
  e.g. Iron Reckoning, Reforge Vow, Phoenix Aura, Pyric Bulwark, Dust Plague, Stonewrath,
  Gale Echo, Crimson Cascade, …) — all the same improvement. Consequently Wrath Squall,
  Tombplate, and Quickearth Rite use a comma (not the colon some agents wrote).
- Crimson Regen Mantle uses existing conventions ("every 1 second, if you have less
  than 50%[HP]") rather than the agent's one-off "each second you are below 50%[HP]".
- Two other non-flagged cards changed consistently: **Stonepacer** (cap dropped —
  gain 3 == max 3), **Cinderscar** ("for each" → "per"), **Misting Veil** & **Slipvenom
  Tempo** (same reorder rules as Mist Step / Frostbind). 27 non-flagged cards changed total.
- Fixed 2 stale assertions in `tests/ui/CardDynamicValue.test.ts` (Last Stand Bulwark,
  Bedrock Snare) that expected phantom "more" phrasing for gated hits with no
  unconditional base — left over from the in-progress bleed/stun rework.

## Summary — changes per formatter pattern

| Pattern | Cards | Kind |
|---|---|---|
| pyre-ordering | 6 | systematic |
| gated-relative-phrasing | 4 | systematic (2 "→ more", 2 "→ at least / comma") |
| duplicate-brace-merge | 3 | systematic |
| merge-same-window-auras | 3 | 2 systematic + 1 bespoke (Crimson Regen Mantle) |
| duplicate-gate-merge | 2 | systematic |
| collapse-identical-damage-hits | 1 | systematic |
| duration-aura-comma-phrasing | 1 | systematic |
| vengeance-duration-extension | 1 | systematic (canonical Razor Stance) |
| group-gated-bonus-with-base | 1 | systematic |
| trailing-timed-buff-ordering | 1 | systematic |
| self-pierce-prose | 1 | systematic |
| merge-same-verb-gains | 1 | systematic |
| drop-cap-when-equal-to-gain | 1 | systematic |
| drop-one-in-per-armor | 1 | systematic |
| merge-repeated-apply-as-more | 1 | systematic |
| per-stack-phrasing-consistency | 1 | systematic |
| per-hit-gated-damage | 1 | systematic (ACCURACY) |
| collapse-repeated-detonators | 1 | bespoke (Tremor Detonate) |
| merge-consume-and-flat-apply | 1 | bespoke (Brine Crucible) |
| aoe-scope-once | 1 | bespoke (Tectonic Reckoning) |

## Accuracy fixes (text currently lies about behavior)

- **Pyre / Cinder Sprint / Venom Detonation** — Pyre detonators read `deal N per [burn] on enemy, then consume all [burn]`; the burn is actually consumed, so the order/wording is wrong → `Consume all [burn] and deal N per [burn] consumed`.
- **Stormstone Tempo** — the stun-gated Pierce carries `per_hit:true` (fires on all 3 hits) but reads as one hit → `each hit also deals 4([dex]) Pierce`.
- **Mist Step (flag only, no text change)** — `[slow]` is design-locked as "no damage" but the engine still ticks small slow damage. Engine/design mismatch to resolve separately.

## Full before → after table

| id | name | before | after |
|---|---|---|---|
| t1-agility | Quickstep | Deal 4. Deal 4. | Deal 4 twice. |
| t1-counter | Riposte | For 6 seconds: every time you hit an enemy, deal 3. | For 6 seconds, every time you hit an enemy, deal 3. |
| t2-counter-counter | Razor Stance | For 10 seconds: every time you hit an enemy, apply 1[bleed]([dex]). Vengeance: For 4 seconds: every time you hit an enemy, apply 1[bleed]([dex]). | For 10 seconds, every time you hit an enemy, apply 1[bleed]([dex]). Vengeance: +4 seconds. |
| t2-fire-fire | Pyre | Deal 4([int]). Deal 3 damage per [burn] on enemy, then consume all [burn]. Apply 3[burn]. | Deal 4([int]). Consume all [burn] and deal 3 damage per [burn] consumed. Apply 3[burn]. |
| t2-water-water | Frostbind | Apply 1[stun]([int]). Gain 4[armor]([vit]). Vengeance: apply 1 more [stun]([int]). | Apply 1[stun]([int]). Vengeance: apply 1 more [stun]([int]). Gain 4[armor]([vit]). |
| t2-agility-water | Mist Step | Heal 3([spi]). Gain 1[stam]. For 6 seconds: +1 [dex]. Apply 1[slow]. | Heal 3([spi]). Gain 1[stam]. Apply 1[slow]. For 6 seconds: +1[dex]. |
| t2-attack-counter | Bloodprice Strike | Lose 4[HP] (Pierce). Deal 12([str]). Gain 2([str])[rage]. Gain 1[stam]. | Lose 4[HP], ignoring your [armor]. Deal 12([str]). Gain 2([str])[rage]. Gain 1[stam]. |
| t2-attack-fire | Kindle Strike | Apply 3[burn]([int]). If enemy has [bleed]: Apply 3[burn]([int]). | Apply 3[burn]([int]). If enemy has [bleed]: apply 3 more [burn]([int]). |
| t2-attack-water | Crimson Tithe | Gain 1[stam]([spi]). Gain 1[mana]([spi]). Gain 3[rage]. | Gain 1[stam]([spi]) and 1[mana]([spi]). Gain 3[rage]. |
| t2-defense-fire | Forge Spike Ward | Gain 5[armor]([vit]). For 6 seconds: if you gain 12+ [armor], gain 1[vit] this combat (max 3 per combat). | Gain 5[armor]([vit]). For 6 seconds, if you gain at least 12[armor], gain 1[vit] this combat (max 3 per combat). |
| t3-attack-attack-counter | Bloodlash Salvo | Deal 9([str]). Gain 4[str] this combat (max 4 per combat). | Deal 9([str]). Gain 4[str] this combat. |
| t3-attack-defense-defense | Body Slam Vow | Deal 2 Pierce, +1 damage per 1[armor] you have. Gain 6[armor]([vit]). | Deal 2 Pierce, +1 damage per [armor] you have. Gain 6[armor]([vit]). |
| t3-agility-attack-counter | Vein Splitter | Deal 4([dex]) three times. Each hit applies 1[bleed]([dex]). If enemy has [bleed]: each hit applies 1[bleed]([dex]). | Deal 4([dex]) three times. Each hit applies 1[bleed]([dex]). If enemy has [bleed]: each hit applies 1 more [bleed]([dex]). |
| t3-air-fire-water | Steaming Plague | Apply 3[poison]([int]) to all enemies. If enemy has [poison]: Apply 2[poison]([int]) to all enemies. | Apply 3[poison]([int]) to all enemies. If enemy has [poison]: apply 2 more [poison]([int]). |
| t3-air-counter-counter | Wrath Squall | Exhaust. For 8 seconds: each time you lose [HP], gain 1[str] this combat (max 5 per combat). For 8 seconds: each time you lose [HP], gain 3([vit])[rage]. | Exhaust. For 8 seconds, each time you lose [HP], gain 1[str] this combat (max 5 per combat) and gain 3([vit])[rage]. |
| t3-attack-counter-water | Necrotic Festering | Apply 3[bleed]([dex]). Apply 1[poison]([int]) for each [bleed] on enemy. Deal 2([str]) Pierce per [bleed] on enemy. | Apply 3[bleed]([dex]). Apply 1[poison]([int]) per [bleed] on enemy. Deal 2([str]) Pierce per [bleed] on enemy. |
| t3-air-attack-counter | Thunderstrike Catalyst | Consume all [slow]. Deal 6([str]). If enemy has [slow]: Deal 6([int]) Pierce per [slow] consumed. | Deal 6([str]). Consume all [slow] and deal 6([int]) Pierce per [slow] consumed. |

| t3-counter-defense-water | Crimson Regen Mantle | Gain 8[armor]([vit]). For 12 seconds: every 1 second, if you have less than 50%[HP]: Heal 3([spi]). Consume all [poison], [bleed] and [burn] and deal 3([str]) Pierce per stack consumed. |
